title: 🚀 Win Free Elevate 2026 Tickets & Team Day Out at Our NYC Community Hackathon!

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Leadership Meets AI Webinar post1920×1920 90 KB

We’re giving away FREE Elevate 2026 tickets AND a full team day out as our grand prize for the Community Vibe Hackathon at Elevate NY!

Here’s what you need to know:

What: Build a mini app with monday vibe in just 30 minutes
Who: Side-by-side guidance from monday.com AI experts
Where: Elevate NY (attendees only)
Spots are limited!

Our AI experts will be right there with you to guide you through the process and answer any questions you have.
Whether you’re a pro or just getting started, this is your chance to create something great with the monday vibe.

Ready to join? Click here! Find the hackathon in the Elevate agenda and sign up.
